jobTitle: Scientist (f/m/x) on biodegradation of organic contaminants in water
jobDescription: The Helmholtz Centre for Environmental Research (UFZ) with its 1,100 employees has gained an excellent reputation as an international competence centre for environmental sciences. We are part of the largest scientific organisation in Germany, the Helmholtz association. Our mission: Our research seeks to find a balance between social development and the long-term protection of our natural resources. For a systematic study on the persistence of organic chemicals and formation of transformation products in the context of agricultural reuse of water the Department of Environmental Analytical Chemistry seeks a Scientist (f/m/x) on biodegradation of organic contaminants in water.
jobTasks: Development of a suitable biodegradation test system
Analysis of transformation products by liquid-chromatography-high resolution–mass spectrometry
